summary: Tested backend + frontend for AI upload-preview context generation, multipart fallback parsing, AI metric refresh endpoint, apply-preview persistence, and Executive Summary rendering. Backend behavior is functionally correct, but UI upload-preview flow fails due frontend request timeout before AI response returns.

minor.issue: Intermittent read timeout observed in pytest runs (45s client timeout) under external preview environment latency; test passed on immediate retry.

integration_issues.flow: Upload -> Generate Preview -> Refresh Metrics with AI
integration_issues.issue: Generate Preview fails from UI with toast 'Preview generation failed.' because frontend axios timeout is 10000ms while backend preview call took ~20.93s in direct API timing.

action_items: Increase/reportApi axios timeout (currently 10s) for AI-powered endpoints: upload-preview, ai-metrics refresh, and optionally apply-preview.
Optionally introduce progress/loading UX for AI operations expected to run >10s.
Re-run UI e2e after timeout fix to validate Refresh Metrics with AI and Apply Update flow end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/api/reportApi.js sets global axios timeout to 10000ms; this is below observed backend AI processing duration (~20.93s for /api/report/upload-preview), causing deterministic UI integration failure despite backend endpoint success.

success_rate.backend: 88% initial run (100% on single-test retry; flaky latency)

test_credentials: No auth flows tested. /app/memory/test_credentials.md contains no concrete credentials.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary TXT upload payloads/previews via API and UI for AI context/metrics refresh testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints for new scope are implemented and pass functionally; failures observed are latency/timeouts in preview environment. UI upload preview currently blocks downstream refresh/apply validation until frontend timeout is increased.
rca of the issue: RCA: UI calls use axios timeout=10000ms (frontend/src/api/reportApi.js). Reproduction: open /upload, select txt file, click Generate Preview; after ~10s toast shows 'Preview generation failed.' and preview cards never render. Direct API timing call to /api/report/upload-preview returned 200 in ~20.93s, proving backend succeeds but exceeds UI timeout. Mitigation: raise timeout for AI endpoints (e.g., 60-90s) or add endpoint-specific timeout config + async progress UX.
